vision: A mobile app for individuals to manage daily tasks efficiently through creation, completion tracking, and filtering capabilities.

epics.name: Task Management
epics.description: Core functionality for creating, completing, and deleting tasks

stories.title: Create task with title and due date
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a task with a title and due date, so that I can track what needs to be done and when
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen, When I tap the add task button and enter a title and due date and save, Then the task appears in my task list
Given I am creating a new task, When I leave the title empty and try to save, Then I see an error message requiring a title
Given I am creating a new task, When I select a due date, Then the date is saved and displayed with the task

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress on daily tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task in my list, When I tap the complete button on the task, Then the task is marked as complete with visual indication
Given I have a completed task, When I tap the complete button again, Then the task is marked as incomplete

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove tasks I no longer need
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list, When I tap the delete button on the task, Then the task is removed from my list
Given I tap delete on a task, When I confirm the deletion, Then the task is permanently removed

epics.name: Task Viewing
epics.description: Functionality for viewing and browsing tasks

stories.title: View all tasks in a list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks saved, When I open the app, Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I have tasks with due dates, When I view the task list, Then each task shows its title and due date
Given I have no tasks, When I view the task list, Then I see an empty state message

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Functionality for filtering tasks by completion status

stories.title: Filter tasks by incomplete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter tasks to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks, When I select the incomplete filter, Then I see only incomplete tasks
Given I am viewing filtered incomplete tasks, When I clear the filter, Then I see all tasks again

stories.title: Filter tasks by complete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter tasks to show only complete tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks, When I select the complete filter, Then I see only completed tasks
Given I am viewing filtered complete tasks, When I clear the filter, Then I see all tasks again

epics.name: Out of Scope
epics.description: Features explicitly excluded from current product scope

stories.title: Team sharing functionality
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to share tasks with team members, so that I can collaborate on shared responsibilities
acceptance_criteria: Given this feature is out of scope, When planning development, Then this story is not included in any sprint
stories.notes: Explicitly out of scope per product document

stories.title: Task reminders and notifications
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to receive reminders for upcoming tasks, so that I don't forget important deadlines
acceptance_criteria: Given this feature is out of scope, When planning development, Then this story is not included in any sprint
stories.notes: Explicitly out of scope per product document
